eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 10:38 PM on JUL 21, 2026 Effective until 12:38 AM JUL 22, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The National Weather Service has issued a flash flood watch for the Aspen Acres Burn scar in Beulah. Residents in that area are advised to monitor conditions, social media and news outlets for changes and updates. Residents should also be prepared to evacuate to higher ground should conditions change. The National Weather Service has issued a flash flood watch for the Aspen Acres Burn scar in Beulah.
